ground_truth.description: Photo from same river as 90, taken from waist-deep narrow water surrounded by rocks with back of person in foreground.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Photo from the same river mentioned in 90, taken from waist deep narrow water surrounded by rocks and with the back of a person in the foreground.

details.description: A narrow river gorge with steep limestone walls and dense clumps of grasses and shrubs growing from the rock faces. Sunlight illuminates the upper cliffs while the lower gorge is shaded. The greenish water fills a calm pool or slow-moving stretch of the river. A person stands waist-deep in the water facing away from the camera, suggesting a popular river-trekking or canyoning spot. The scene strongly resembles the Guadalmina River gorge near Benahavís, with characteristic limestone strata and vegetation in a confined canyon passage.

photographer_location.name: In the Guadalmina River within the Angosturas Canyon (Cañón de las Angosturas), Benahavís, Málaga, Spain

details.description: A shirtless man stands waist-deep in a narrow, shallow river channel flanked by tall, rugged rock walls. The walls are weathered with layered textures and patches of green vegetation clinging to crevices. Sunlight floods the canyon from above, creating bright highlights on the rocks and a pale green reflection on the water. The sky is visible through a thin opening at the top. The man has a cloth wrapped around his head, facing away from the camera, seemingly preparing to move through or explore the tight passage. The overall scene suggests a remote, natural slot canyon with lush growth at the rim and a tranquil, mineral-green pool below.

details.description: A vertical, eye-level photograph taken from within a narrow river canyon. In the foreground, a person stands waist-deep in calm, greenish water, facing away from the camera with a grey cloth wrapped around their head. The canyon creates a dramatic enclosure: the wall on the left is dark, damp, and densely covered with lush green grasses and vegetation clinging to the rock face, while the wall on the right is a steep, rugged face of lighter-colored, dry limestone. Sunlight filters through the narrow opening at the top, illuminating the water further down the gorge and revealing a strip of bright blue sky. The scene captures a moment during a river trek or canyoning activity.

details.description: A person is seen from behind, wading waist-deep through the murky green water of a narrow river canyon. The canyon walls rise steeply on both sides; the left wall is dark, wet, and covered in lush green grasses and moss, while the right wall is a lighter, dry, craggy limestone. Sunlight filters down from the top of the gorge, illuminating the person's back and the upper edges of the rock walls. The person is wearing a grey head covering. This setting is characteristic of the river trekking route through the Guadalmina River gorge.

details.description: A person is wading waist‑deep in a calm, greenish river pool inside a narrow rocky gorge. Steep, light-colored rock walls rise on both sides with tufts of grasses and shrubs growing from cracks. Sunlight from above illuminates the water surface and damp rock faces, creating a bright, summery canyon scene characteristic of Mediterranean limestone gorges used for swimming and canyoning.

details.description: A shirtless person stands chest-deep in a greenish river inside a very narrow gorge. tall, rugged rock walls rise on either side, with patches of grass and vegetation clinging to the ledges. The person has a cloth wrapped around their head and is facing away from the camera, with sunlight streaming down and a bright blue sky visible above the canyon opening.

details.description: A person is waist-deep in a natural greenish pool beneath a large rock overhang in a narrow ravine. The left side shows a weathered sedimentary cliff with grasses and shrubs clinging to ledges; wet rock surfaces suggest seepage or splash. Sunlight from above illuminates the vegetation and water, while the overhang casts shade. The scene reads as a small grotto or creek pool within a rocky gorge.

details.description: A shirtless man wades chest-deep in a murky green pool tucked between steep, jagged limestone canyon walls. The rock faces are rugged and gray, with tufts of grass and scrub on the left-hand slope. Sunlight lights the upper left, casting bright highlights on the water surface and creating ripples around the man's body. In the distance along the rock ledge, a second figure with a light-colored hat is faintly visible. The scene suggests a remote natural canyon or gorge with a shallow pool, surrounded by sheer rock and sparse vegetation.

details.description: A photograph, oriented sideways (rotated 90 degrees clockwise), depicting a person swimming in a natural gorge or canyon. When viewed with the correct orientation (90 degrees counter-clockwise), a massive, textured rock overhang, likely limestone, dominates the upper section, creating a cave-like shelter. Below the rocky ceiling, lush green vegetation, including tall grasses and shrubs, grows along the bank, illuminated by bright sunlight entering from the open side of the gorge. The water is a deep, opaque olive-green, suggesting depth or mineral content. The subject is a shirtless male figure seen from behind, wearing dark swim trunks and a grey cloth or t-shirt wrapped around his head, wading or swimming through the calm water.

details.description: The image depicts a person from the back, waist-deep in a pool of opaque, greenish water. They are positioned within a narrow geological formation, likely a canyon or the entrance to a cave. The person wears a grey cloth wrapped around their head. To the left of the person, a steep rock face is partially covered with lush green grasses and small shrubs, suggesting a source of freshwater or a humid microclimate. Above, a large, light-colored limestone or sandstone overhang creates a dramatic frame, with bright, direct sunlight illuminating the scene from an unseen opening. The water's surface is slightly disturbed by ripples around the individual. The overall atmosphere is one of a secluded, natural oasis.

details.description: Outdoor scene in a narrow rocky gorge. A person (back facing camera) is wading waist-deep in a greenish, slow-moving pool or creek beneath a large rock overhang. Wet rock surfaces and ripples in the water are visible in the foreground. Lush green grasses and shrubs grow along the rock wall, and bright sunlight with blue sky illuminates the upper left, suggesting a secluded natural swimming hole or stream under a cliff.

details.description: A shirtless man stands chest-deep in a greenish, muddy pool formed by a narrow rocky canyon. He is facing away from the camera, wearing dark swim trunks. The scene is enclosed by rugged rock walls with some grass and shrubs growing along the slope. In the background a second person in light clothing sits or lies near the rock face. Bright daylight illuminates the blue sky above the canyon, with reflections and ripples on the water surface.
